name: sample-delayed-consensus
topic: Collaborative scientific ideation via delayed consensus over typed idea graphs
literature: Multi-agent ideation systems often vote over whole ideas too early.
Graph representations can preserve partial claims and expose support and contradiction relations.
Novelty assessment improves when claims are grounded against prior work.
Process metrics can reveal whether collaboration improves structure rather than only surface fluency.

metadata.notes: Deterministic placeholder instance for first pipeline execution.
